data.acceptance: The knot-not-found path must include a clear, explicit note to run `kno -C <repo_root> ...` when using worktrees, where `<repo_root>` is the repository root passed to the command. Existing non-worktree and successful-command behavior must remain unchanged, with no new side effects beyond message content for the not-found case. Validation should confirm the hint appears for any command that returns a knot-not-found error, and does not appear for unrelated error types.
